task_completion.description: Verify that the Epi Info 7 project 'HouseholdSurvey' and the parent form 'Household' have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info 7 Form Designer is open. The Project Explorer pane shows 'HouseholdSurvey' as the project name and 'Household' as a form/view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Household' form contains the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Household' form canvas displays input fields labeled 'Address' (Text box), 'CensusTract' (Number box), and 'VisitDate' (Date picker).

task_completion.description: Verify that the child form 'Member' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Project Explorer pane shows 'Member' as a form/view under the 'HouseholdSurvey' project.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Member' form contains the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Member' form canvas displays input fields labeled 'FullName' (Text box), 'Age' (Number box), and 'Sex' (Dropdown/Legal Values box).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sex' field is configured with the legal values 'Male' and 'Female'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Legal Values' configuration dialog or data table shows 'Male' and 'Female' as options, or the 'Sex' dropdown field on the form is expanded showing 'Male' and 'Female'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a link from 'Household' to 'Member' is established using a button.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Household' form canvas contains a Relate button labeled 'Add Family Member' which is used to link to the 'Member' child form.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Epi Info 7 GUI to create the project and forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Epi Info 7 Form Designer interface (e.g., clicking menus, dragging fields, typing in dialog boxes), rather than using a terminal or text editor to write XML.

integrity.description: Verify that the actual Epi Info 7 software is being used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should have the standard Epi Info 7 Form Designer layout, icons, and window title.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply copy or download pre-made project files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots should show the step-by-step creation of the project, forms, and fields within the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Epi Info 7\Projects\HouseholdSurvey\HouseholdSurvey.prj. Expected Views: 'Household' and 'Member'. Household Fields: 'Address' (Text), 'CensusTract' (Number), 'VisitDate' (Date). Member Fields: 'FullName' (Text), 'Age' (Number), 'Sex' (Legal Values). Legal Values for Sex: 'Male', 'Female'.
